title: dryopteris glanduligera
intro: Dryopteris glanduligera is a species of fern native to East Asia, characterized by its distinctive leaflets and glandular hairs. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Dryopteris glanduligera are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to limited scientific research and potential side effects.
